MODULE: cosmos.web.cosmosynapse.engine.lyapunov_lock
FILE: cosmos/web/cosmosynapse/engine/lyapunov_lock.py (259 lines)
CATEGORY: web

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Lyapunov Gatekeeper - 12D Cosmic Synapse Theory (CST)
================================================================

Implements the "Non-Vanishing Penalty Function" to strictly enforce
stability in the Cybernetic Loop.

Theory:
- Lyapunov Stability: V(x) > 0, dV/dt < 0 (Energy must decay t

CLASSES:
- StabilityReport
- LyapunovGatekeeper
  Methods: def calculate_informational_mass(self, text: str, physics_state: dict) -> float
  Methods: def apply_non_vanishing_penalty(self, drift: float) -> float
  Methods: def validate_response(self, draft_response: str, current_physics: dict) -> StabilityReport
  Methods: def validate_token_stream(self, tokens: list, current_physics: dict, check_every_n: int=5) -> tuple
